Bash(cat > /mnt/c/Users/Wilso/peptidessssss/public/images/blog/epithalon-longevity.svg << 'SVGEOF'
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1200" height="630" viewBox="0 0 1200 630">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#0d0020"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#060010"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="accent" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#a855f7"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ec4899"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="orb1" cx="50%" cy="50%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#a855f7;stop-opacity:0.2"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#a855f7;stop-opacity:0"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="630" fill="url\(#bg\)"/>
  <ellipse cx="980" cy="280" rx="420" ry="420" fill="url\(#orb1\)"/>
  <!-- Telomere spiral visualization -->
  <g opacity="0.12" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
    <path d="M780,100 C900,100 1000,150 1050,200 C1100,250 1120,320 1100,390 C1080,460 1020,510 950,530 C880,550 800,530 750,490"/>
    <path d="M800,130 C910,125 1010,172 1060,225 C1110,278 1130,345 1110,412 C1090,479 1033,525 965,543 C897,561 818,541 770,503"/>
    <path d="M760,160 C875,148 980,195 1030,250 C1080,305 1098,373 1078,439 C1058,505 999,549 932,565 C865,581 787,559 740,519"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Chromosome end caps -->
  <g opacity="0.2" fill="#a855f7">
    <rect x="830" y="90" width="80" height="15" rx="7"/>
    <rect x="830" y="525" width="80" height="15" rx="7"/>
    <rect x="900" y="88" width="80" height="15" rx="7"/>
    <rect x="900" y="527" width="80" height="15" rx="7"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Stars / longevity sparkles -->
  <g opacity="0.25" fill="#ec4899">
    <circle cx="1100" cy="120" r="3"/>
    <circle cx="1130" cy="90" r="2"/>
    <circle cx="1150" cy="130" r="4"/>
    <circle cx="1120" cy="160" r="2"/>
    <circle cx="1080" cy="100" r="3"/>
    <circle cx="1160" cy="100" r="2"/>
    <circle cx="1090" cy="150" r="2"/>
    <circle cx="1140" cy="75" r="3"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1200" height="4" fill="url\(#accent\)"/>
  <rect x="80" y="185" width="230" height="34" rx="17" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
  <text x="195" y="207" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#a855f7" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="2">ANTI-AGING & LONGEVITY</text>
  <text x="80" y="278" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="52" font-weight="800" fill="white">Epithalon</text>
  <text x="80" y="340" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="34" font-weight="700" fill="rgba\(255,255,255,0.85\)">The Science of Telomere</text>
  <text x="80" y="388" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="34" font-weight="700" fill="rgba\(255,255,255,0.85\)">Elongation</text>
  <rect x="80" y="408" width="120" height="3" rx="1.5" fill="url\(#accent\)"/>
  <text x="80" y="448" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="rgba\(255,255,255,0.45\)">35 Years of Longevity Research Reviewed</text>
  <text x="80" y="580" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="15" fill="rgba\(255,255,255,0.3\)" letter-spacing="3">PEPTIDELAB.COM</text>
</svg>
SVGEOF
echo "done epithalon")

  <text x="187" y="207" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#06b6d4" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="2">COGNITIVE & NOOTROPIC</text>
